title: Documentation Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger documentation foundations judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Documentation Foundations is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Documentation Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good documentation foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Documentation Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
